name: ROS Noetic Development Container
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; grep -qxF "source /opt/ros/noetic/setup.bash" ~/.bashrc || echo "source /opt/ros/noetic/setup.bash" >> ~/.bashrc; source /opt/ros/noetic/setup.bash; if [ ! -f /etc/ros/rosdep/sources.list.d/20-default.list ]; then sudo rosdep init; fi; rosdep update --rosdistro noetic; git -C /workspaces/open_mower_ros submodule update --init --recursive; sudo apt-get update; rosdep install --from-paths src --ignore-src --default-yes --rosdistro noetic'
